steps_requiring_developer_intervention: Completion governance writeback wiring and enforcement
Any change to fulfillment-truth schema if completion flags need expansion
steps_requiring_terminal_access: Building and running the operator frontend in development
Any backfill or repair of fulfillment truth outside the UI
steps_requiring_missing_action: Complete engagement from the command center with governed fulfillment-truth writeback
what_prevents_non_technical_employee: Completion is still governed by a direct truth writeback path and not yet a polished operator workflow
A real paid merchant must already exist in fulfillment truth for the journey to be meaningful
There is no fully self-service payment-to-completion automation across all stages
first_real_world_blocker: Completion still depends on governed fulfillment-truth state change and a verified paid item; the operator cannot fully finish the journey without that final writeback path being accepted as production-ready.
highest_roi_improvement: Turn completion into a first-class operator action that updates fulfillment truth and returns the refreshed lifecycle registry automatically.
